summaries.title: PM2 v7 env_file directive does not load .env — env vars must be in env block
summaries.summary: PM2 v7's `env_file` directive does not load .env files; environment variables must be placed directly in the `env` block of ecosystem.config.js. To apply new env vars, use `pm2 delete` and `pm2 start` instead of `pm2 restart`, as restart reuses the old process environment.
